-- If ℙ A ≠ 0, we can use the definition of conditional probability.
    simp [condProb]
    <;> field_simp [hB, h]
    <;> rw [Set.inter_comm]
    <;> simp [hB, h]

-- Case where ℙ A ≠ 0
    have h1 : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
      have h2 : A ∩ B = B ∩ A := by
        rw [inter_comm]
      rw [h2]
    have h2 : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ (A ∩ B) := by
      have h3 : B ∩ A = A ∩ B := by
        rw [inter_comm]
      rw [h3]
    simp [condProb, h1, hB, h2, h]
    <;> field_simp [hB, h]
    <;> ring

-- Case where ℙ A = 0
    rw [condProb]
    rw [h]
    have h1 : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
      have h2 : A ∩ B ⊆ A := by
        intro x hx
        simp at hx ⊢
        tauto
      have h3 : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := by
        apply measure_mono h2
      rw [h] at h3
      have h4 : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
        linarith
      exact h4
    simp [hB, h1]
    <;> try { tauto }
  · -- Case where ℙ A ≠ 0
    rw [condProb]
    have h5 : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ (A ∩ B) := by
      rw [show B ∩ A = A ∩ B by rw [inter_comm]]
    have h8 : ℙ A * ℙ (B | A) / ℙ B = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by
      rw [condProb] -- Expands ℙ(B|A)
      have h9 : ℙ A ≠ 0 := h -- The hypothesis from by_cases
      field_simp [h9] -- Simplifies ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) to ℙ (B ∩ A)
      <;> try { rw [show B ∩ A = A ∩ B by rw [inter_comm]] } -- B ∩ A = A ∩ B
      <;> try { tauto }
    linarith [h8]

    rw [condProb, condProb]
    rw [h1, h]
